payload.content: If the hop-1 retrieved titles already cover every named entity in the claim, pick the most specific descriptive phrase (a date range, a relationship, a location, a property) as the hop-2 query anchor. Do not emit a query that is just the claim reworded.

rationale: Edge-case probe distinct from ech_no_bridge: covers the case where ALL claim entities are already grounded but the claim is not yet supported. Tests whether explicit fallback to descriptive-phrase anchors recovers retrieval where entity-anchor strategies are exhausted.
